specs.title: cp-000: EDITOR_SHORTCUTS defines versionHistory Mod-Shift-h but no keyboard shortcut ope
cp-001: EDITOR_FONTS defines three font options Serif var--font-merriweather Sans-serif
cp-002: TYPOGRAPHY constants define contentMaxWidth 720px wideMaxWidth 960px bodySize 16
cp-003: PrecisionEditAction type defines 14 discrete edit actions rephrase shorten expan
cp-004: PRECISION_EDIT_LABELS maps each action to a human label eg make_academic Make Ac
cp-005: ScholarRules interface defines project-level AI configuration with fields docume
cp-006: ScholarRulesghost_text sub-interface includes enabled pause_delay_ms max_length_
cp-007: ScholarRulesvoice accepts first_person_plural first_person_singular third_person
cp-008: ScholarRulestense maps per-section tense preferences for introduction methods re
cp-009: DraftContext interface sends intensity documentType currentSection targetJournal
cp-010: PrecisionEditRequest sends action selectedText instruction surroundingContext do
cp-011: PrecisionEditResponse returns originalText suggestedText explanation action
cp-012: SuggestionSeverity type defines three levels error improvement polish
cp-013: SuggestionCategory type defines three categories language consistency structure
cp-014: Citation node overrides attribute when non-null is a record keyed by referenceId
cp-015: Citation locatorType accepts page chapter figure table section
cp-016: Citation overrides are parsed from data-overrides HTML attribute via JSONparse w
cp-017: CitationStyleId type defines exactly 7 styles vancouver apa ama icmje harvard ch
cp-018: Numeric citation styles vancouver ieee ama icmje compress consecutive numbers in
cp-019: Author-year citation styles format as 1 author Smith 2020 2 authors Smith Jones
cp-020: Multiple author-year citations are separated by semicolons Smith 2020 Jones 2021
cp-021: Author-year citations with no resolved references display as fallback
cp-022: Numeric citations with no assigned numbers display as fallback
cp-023: Citation chip selected state adds ring-2 ring-blue-400 darkring-blue-500 ring-of
cp-024: Citation chip base colors bg-blue-50 darkbg-blue-95040 text-blue-700 darktext-bl
cp-025: Citation chip has a data-citation HTML attribute
cp-026: Citation popover container is w-72 288px with rounded-xl corners
cp-027: Citation tooltip authors line uses font-semibold class
cp-028: Citation tooltip title uses text-gray-300 darktext-gray-600 truncate max-w-250px
cp-029: Citation tooltip journal uses text-gray-400 darktext-gray-500 italic
cp-030: Citation tooltip separator between entries uses border-t border-gray-700 darkbor
cp-031: Citation popover View button icon is ArrowSquareOut size 10 Remove button icon i
cp-032: Vancouver fallback takes the first 6 authors maximum if 6 appends et al
cp-033: Vancouver author initials are computed by splitting given name on s taking first
cp-034: Vancouver author format Family Initials eg Smith JA
